description: 5 DPO trial configurations - varies beta, learning rate, batch size

trials.name: trial_1_conservative
trials.description: Conservative DPO baseline - standard beta and low LR

trials.name: trial_2_low_beta
trials.description: Very low beta - minimal KL constraint, allows large drift from SFT model

trials.name: trial_3_high_beta
trials.description: High beta - strong KL penalty, stays close to SFT model

trials.name: trial_4_high_lr
trials.description: Aggressive learning rate - tests training stability

trials.name: trial_5_large_batch
trials.description: Larger batch size - tests effect of batch size on preference learning
